extra.reason: Implemented a reusable shell-owned SymbolSearch component wired to /v1/subjects/resolve and reused by the top bar plus watchlist rail.
Added the P1.1-compatible quote snapshot stub with listing-oriented shape including as_of, delay_class, currency, source_id, and recent range data.
Rendered the subject-detail landing with canonical display identity, listing context, price, absolute and percentage move, freshness/session state, and a small recent-range chart.
Implemented debounced symbol typeahead with ranked inline candidates, arrow-key highlight movement, explicit-choice hydration, and Enter auto-advance for unique results.

Completed all P0.4 child work: shared symbol search/typeahead, resolver handoff into symbol detail, P1.1 quote stub, and first quote snapshot landing. Verified with web tests, typecheck, lint, and production build.

Added quoteFromSubjectRef in web/src/symbol/quote.ts that routes watchlist row hydration through the same createQuoteSnapshotStub that subject detail uses. Factored subjectFromRef out of subjectFromRouteParam in search.ts so the URL-entered landing path and the watchlist row path build the minimal ResolvedSubject the exact same way. ManualWatchlist.tsx now renders each row as a Link(to=symbolDetailPathForSubject) with primary ticker/kind label, secondary MIC·currency, price (formatQuotePrice), signed percent move (direction-colored), and a freshness title attribute; the Remove button is a sibling outside the Link for accessibility. WatchlistSlot.tsx comment updated. Verification: new quote.test.ts equivalence test asserts deepEqual(quoteFromSubjectRef(ref), createQuoteSnapshotStub(subjectFromRouteParam(subjectRouteParam(ref)))) — row and landing share one derivation for the same subject. Live-verified in browser: row listing:1111… showed $108.71 / -1.62%, landing showed $108.71 / -1.79 (-1.62%); issuer:3333… row showed $239.91 / +0.17%, landing showed $239.91 / +0.41 (+0.17%). All 43 web tests pass, typecheck + lint + vite build green.

Replaced the SaveToWatchlistProtectedAction.payload from {symbol: string} to {subject_ref: SubjectRef, display_name?: string} since the watchlist persists canonical SubjectRefs. SubjectDetailShell now renders a Save-to-watchlist button below the QuoteSnapshot in the public subject-detail header; click fires requestProtectedAction with the resolved subject_ref + display_name. WatchlistSlot registers a useResumedProtectedAction handler for SaveToWatchlist that calls watchlist.addSubject(action.payload.subject_ref) — when an unauth click queues the pending action and the user signs in, AuthInterruptProvider dispatches the resume and the membership add lands automatically. authInterruptState.isProtectedAction validates the subject_ref shape (kind ∈ SUBJECT_KINDS, non-empty id) plus optional string display_name. Retired the HomePage P0.1.3 scaffold (Save AAPL button) — replaced by the real CTA on subject detail per its own deprecation comment. Verification: 45/45 web tests pass (including new round-trip and rejection tests for the new payload shape); typecheck + lint + vite build green; live E2E in browser exercised four flows on /symbol/listing:1111…/overview: (1) unauth click opens modal with 'Saving Listing subject…' message and stores pending action with subject_ref+returnTo; (2) Sign in dispatches and adds to watchlist while preserving the URL; (3) authed click adds immediately without modal; (4) Cancel dismisses modal, clears pending, preserves URL, does not add.

Implemented MarketDataAdapter interface (services/market/src/adapter.ts) with NormalizedQuote/NormalizedBars carrying spec §6.2.1 metadata (as_of, delay_class, currency, source_id, adjustment_basis); first adapter is Polygon (services/market/src/adapters/polygon.ts) with injected fetcher + listing-context resolver. 9 tests pass including the bead's verification clause: a fixture adapter and the Polygon adapter produce identical consumer output. Sibling subtasks fra-cw0.1.2/.1.3/.1.4/.1.5/.1.6 will tighten the quote/bar contracts, availability outcomes, corp actions, and dev-api wiring.

Implemented quote contract via smart constructor + schema assertion (services/market/src/quote.ts). Spec §6.2.1 metadata fields (as_of, delay_class, currency, source_id) plus parent-epic move math (prev_close, change_abs, change_pct) are all validated at construction; assertQuoteContract re-asserts the same invariants for any adapter. Polygon adapter migrated from /v2/last/trade to /v2/snapshot to source prev_close in one round trip. New contract.test.ts proves: (a) Polygon adapter satisfies the contract, (b) fixture adapter satisfies the contract, (c) a deliberately-broken adapter is correctly rejected. 20 new tests, all 29 in services/market pass.

Implemented bar contract via smart constructor + schema assertion (services/market/src/bar.ts) mirroring the quote-contract pattern from fra-cw0.1.2. NormalizedBars carries spec §6.2.1 metadata (listing, interval, range, as_of, delay_class, currency, source_id, adjustment_basis); the constructor and assertBarsContract enforce: required-field presence, ISO 4217 currency, UUID v4 source_id, ISO-8601 timestamps with explicit offset, BarInterval/AdjustmentBasis enums, range start < end, every bar's ts in [start, end), strictly ascending ts, OHLC invariants (high>=low, high>=max(open,close), low<=min(open,close)), and volume>=0. Extracted shared validators to services/market/src/validators.ts (used by both quote.ts and bar.ts). Polygon getBars now routes through normalizedBars(). Bead verification clause: contract.test.ts asserts the bars contract for Polygon (adjusted=true), Polygon (adjusted=false), and a fixture adapter; a deliberately-broken adapter is correctly rejected. 21 new tests, all 49 in services/market pass.

Implemented MarketDataOutcome envelope (available/unavailable). Polygon adapter classifies provider errors (PolygonFetchError 5xx -> provider_error retryable, 404 -> missing_coverage, 429 -> rate_limited, malformed payload -> provider_error not_retryable). Pre-fetch caller-side range validation continues to throw. Verification clause covered: contract test simulates 503 -> caller sees normalized envelope with no raw provider fields. 78 tests pass.

Added CorporateAction union (Split | CashDividend | StockDividend | SpinOff) with effective_date and source_id, smart constructor with per-kind validation, and applyCorporateActions(bars, actions, basis) that walks raw bars to a target AdjustmentBasis. Splits + stock dividends adjust price + volume; cash dividends + spin-offs scale pre-ex prices via the prevClose factor leaving volume untouched. Oldest-first action ordering composes correctly (verified across compounded splits and split+dividend mixes). Verification clause covered: 16 dedicated tests, including continuity-across-split-date (max day-to-day jump <= 1 unit after adjustment, vs >= 50 unit drop in unadjusted). 73 tests pass total.

Wired up market HTTP service. Backend: services/market/src/http.ts exposes GET /v1/market/quote that goes through the polygon adapter seam, with a dev-mode fixture fetcher (services/market/src/dev-fixtures.ts) and an in-memory listing repo (services/market/src/listings.ts). Real source_id (DEV_POLYGON_SOURCE_ID UUID) flows through every response. Frontend: removed createQuoteSnapshotStub and quoteFromSubjectRef; added fetchQuoteSnapshot async fetcher; QuoteSnapshot.tsx and ManualWatchlist row both fetch via useEffect with loading/unavailable states. QuoteSnapshot type aligned with the spec contract (delay_class names, session_state names) — dropped stub-only fields (display_name, recent_range, issuer_profile) and let the component access them from ResolvedSubject directly. Vite proxy adds /v1/market route. Dev shell runs the market service on port 4321. Verification: smoke test curls source_id=00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001 (live UUID, not p1.1-stub). 64 market tests + 47 web tests + typecheck all green.

All three children closed: fra-6al.6.1 (default manual watchlist + membership CRUD), fra-6al.6.2 (row quote hydration via shared listing-oriented snapshot), fra-6al.6.3 (add-to-watchlist with inline auth interrupt). Note: row quote hydration was migrated from the P0.4 stub to the real market service in fra-cw0.1.6 (each row now fetches via /v1/market/quote).
Closed
Closed
Closed
Closed

Series query binding implemented with smart-constructor + assertContract pattern. All 5 dimensions (subject_refs, range, interval, basis, normalization) explicitly bound and rejection on missing dimension verified. 131 market tests pass.
Implemented canonical series cache identity and key verification
